title: Capitals of Unusual Countries
editorialSummary: Capitals grouped by region: Central Asian, Pacific Island, Caribbean, and African landlocked. False trail: Naypyidaw (Myanmar) is unusual-sounding like Central Asian capitals but is Southeast Asian — not included. All items are genuine capitals of real nations.

meta.gptRationale: Capital cities of less commonly discussed countries are knowledge-heavy, and several names offer little semantic help if unknown.
